description: --- name: pdf description: "ALWAYS use this skill instead of the Read tool for PDF files. The Read tool cannot extract PDF tables properly. Use this skill when: (1) Reading ANY PDF file, (2) Extracting tables from PDFs, (3) Converting PDF tables to pandas DataFrames, (4) Processing multi-page PDFs"

- For API or SDK work, reject conflicting provider/runtime requests and report the decision in output.validation.
- Refuse or defer unsafe actions in output.validation instead of silently executing them.

apis_tools: {"name": "PDF Processing Guide", "description": "--- name: pdf description: \"ALWAYS use this skill instead of the Read tool for PDF files. The Read tool cannot extract PDF tables properly. Use this skill when: (1) Reading ANY PDF file, (2) Extracting tables from PDFs, (3) Converting PDF tables to pandas DataFrames, (4) Processing multi-page PDFs\"", "steps": ["DO**: Use `pdfplumber` as shown in this skill", "DO NOT**: Use the Read tool to view PDF contents", "Empty table**: Try `page.extract_tables(table_settings={...})` with custom settings", "Merged cells**: Tables with merged cells may extract incorrectly", "Scanned PDFs**: Use OCR (pytesseract) for image-based PDFs", "No tables found**: Check if content is actually a table or styled text"], "tags": ["legacy", "free_text"]}
